    Description
    OptionSourceEligibility
    Valida e normaliza option-sources antes da execucao.
    OptionSourceRegistry
    Registro canônico de option-sources expostas por cada recurso.
  • Classes in org.praxisplatform.uischema.options used by org.praxisplatform.uischema.options
    Class
    Description
    EntityLookupDescriptor
    Entity semantics attached to an option-source when it represents a business lookup.
    LookupCapabilities
    Public capabilities advertised by an entity lookup source.
    LookupDetailDescriptor
    Detail navigation contract for an entity selected by a lookup.
    LookupSelectionPolicy
    Selection rules advertised by an entity lookup source.
    OptionSourceDescriptor
    Descricao canonica de uma option-source metadata-driven.
    OptionSourcePolicy
    Public execution policy for a registered option source.
    OptionSourceRegistry
    Registro canônico de option-sources expostas por cada recurso.
    OptionSourceRegistry.Builder
     
    OptionSourceType
    Canonical source types for metadata-driven option providers.
